summary: P0 bug fix verified: /api/route endpoint now returns 200 OK with valid route data. All backend API tests pass (15/15). Frontend testing confirms route calculation, highway shields, exit signs, speed limit signs, and voice announcements all working correctly.

minor.issue: 504 Gateway Timeout for corridor POI search - external service issue, not app bug

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: P0 bug fix at server.ts line 263 - 'notices' removed from 'return' parameter (was invalid for HERE Routing API v8)
VERIFIED: server.ts line 264 - 'spans' parameter correctly includes 'notices,truckAttributes,speedLimit' (valid for spans)
VERIFIED: Route response includes spans with speedLimit, truckAttributes, and notices data
VERIFIED: Section-level notices present for truck warnings (e.g., 'Violated vehicle restriction')

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified - 'notices' was incorrectly added to HERE API 'return' parameter which caused 400 errors. The fix removed 'notices' from 'return' (line 263) while keeping it in 'spans' (line 264) which is the correct usage. All route calculation features working: highway shields (14 placed), exit signs (4 placed), speed limit signs (4 placed), voice announcements, truck warnings in section notices.

p0_bug_fix.details: /api/route returns 200 OK with valid route data. Previously returned 400 due to invalid 'notices' in return parameter.

route_spans_speedLimit.details: Route response includes spans with speedLimit data

route_spans_truckAttributes.details: Route response includes spans with truckAttributes data

route_spans_notices.details: Route response includes spans with notices data

route_section_notices.details: Route response includes section-level notices for truck warnings

frontend_login.details: Login screen loads, 'Continue as Guest' works

frontend_navigation_view.details: Navigation view loads with Leaflet map, search bar, and controls

route_calculation_flow.details: Search Denver, CO -> calculate route -> route renders on map with 545.9 mi, 7h 39m

highway_shields.details: 14 highway shield markers placed on route

speed_limit_signs.details: 4 speed limit signs placed on route (35 mph visible)

voice_announcements.details: Voice announcements working: 'Starting route to Denver...', 'Speed limit 35 miles per hour'

test_classes: TestRouteEndpoint (7 tests - P0 bug fix verification)
